title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Foxy, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I'm going to break your hand...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: So you can't do the beam thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gah! He went back into the smoke!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I can see you, dumbass! Take that!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Where will the beam shoot from!?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I'm going to teach you a lesson!

summary: Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.
